temporal_description:
(00:00-00:06) A man in a pink plaid shirt, Joey, is speaking to another man whose back is to the camera. Joey gestures with his hands as he explains a series of events. The scene is overlaid with the opening credits for Supervising Producers Brian Buckner and Sebastian Jones, and Producer Wendy Knoller. (Storyline: Joey is recounting a story to his friend, explaining how he met someone's uncle, Murray, who gave him a check.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Conversational, slightly earnest. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:07-00:12) Joey continues his story, pointing his finger for emphasis as he describes how the other person's uncle, Murray, handed him a check. The credits for Producer Wendy Knoller and Executive Producer Susan Silver remain on screen. (Storyline: Joey's story progresses as he describes the uncle handing him the check, setting up the next part of his anecdote.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Storytelling, engaging. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
